# supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [Documentation Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-documentation.html): Handles the core content structure and user-facing documentation pages using MDX. Architectural overview of the Documentation domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Metadata Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-metadata.html): Manages configuration and system-wide settings for the documentation engine. Architectural overview of the Metadata domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [OpenAPI Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-openapi.html): Maintains the formal API specification and endpoint definitions. Architectural overview of the OpenAPI domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Security Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-security.html): Defines authentication protocols and permissions for API access. Architectural overview of the Security domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Styling Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-styling.html): Customizes the visual presentation and branding of the documentation site. Architectural overview of the Styling domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-docs-json.html): Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
- [overrides.css — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-overrides-css.html): Architecture documentation for overrides.css, a css file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
